items.reasoning: Lane sustain against Spiderling harass and wolf pack right-clicks.
Emergency recovery after a Broodmother dive with 6+ Spiderlings.
+2 armor against summon army physical damage. Builds into Buckler.
Stats for Firestorm last-hitting and HP pool against summon pressure.
+2 armor aura helps your support survive summon dives. Active gives +2.5 bonus.
Movement speed to kite summons back into Firestorm AoE.
Free mana for Firestorm spam; Firestorm clears Spiderling waves instantly.
Active blocks 75 damage per hit from ALL summons for 12 seconds. Summons deal 20-40 damage per hit -- completely negated.
Magic barrier absorbs Spawn Spiderlings magic damage and protects team during push defense.
+10 armor aura for entire team during Lycan Shapeshift push. -5 armor on Lycan himself.
Underlord Firestorm upgrade rains fire on summon armies. AoE damage scales.
AoE attack speed slow cripples wolf and spiderling DPS. +15 armor stacks with AC.
Early heal aura for push defense; builds into Guardian Greaves later.
2-second root catches Lycan during Shapeshift before he reaches high ground.

recommendation.overall_strategy: Underlord's Firestorm is the best anti-summon ability in the game -- it melts Spiderlings and wolves in 2 ticks. Crimson Guard is the critical mid-game timing: activate during push and summon damage becomes zero. Stack aura items (AC + Shiva's) to protect the team from push-heavy lineups.
